scripts.build:prime: npm run prime:link-local && VITE_TICKUP_PRIME=1 sh -c 'tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && vite build'
scripts.prime:link-local: if [ -f ../../tickup-prime-final/tickup-prime-1.0.0.tgz ]; then npm install --no-save --prefix .. ../../tickup-prime-final/tickup-prime-1.0.0.tgz && npm install --no-save ../../tickup-prime-final/tickup-prime-1.0.0.tgz; elif [ -f ../../tickup-prime-final/dist/package.json ]; then npm install --no-save --prefix .. ../../tickup-prime-final/dist && npm install --no-save ../../tickup-prime-final/dist; else npm install --no-save --prefix .. ../../tickup-prime-final && npm install --no-save ../../tickup-prime-final; fi
